title: Davit Falls Load Test Report — Southampton
description: A White Star Line inspection document found in the officer's chart locker records the Southampton pre-departure load test of the Welin davit falls: all sixteen sets tested to 70-person capacity with no failures noted. The document directly contradicts the claim made to Lightoller by a junior officer that the falls might not hold a full load — the falls were tested and certified for full capacity four days ago.
